name: @sidewisp/plugin
description: Universal zero-LLM telemetry plugin for monitoring AI agent runtimes with Sidewisp

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check src/auth/credentials.js && node --check src/core/runtime-adapter.js && node --check src/core/collector.js && node --check src/core/health.js && node --check src/core/normalize.js && node --check src/core/sanitize.js && node --check src/core/support.js && node --check src/adapters/openclaw/recovery.js && node --check src/delivery/spool.js && node --check src/delivery/uploader.js && node --test
